_comment: FROZEN honest snapshot of a real M1 run (out_real/, run 2026-06-19). NOT the sealed truth.json; NOT recomputed by the showcase page. Every figure is anchored to tests/fixtures/real/PROVENANCE.md and verified numerically by tests/test_showcase.py::test_ac52b_display_data_matches_provenance_numerically. A fresh clone has no real frame to recompute from, so this committed snapshot IS the page's only data source.
instrument: DDOTI camera C1 (28-cm f/2.2), OAN-SPM San Pedro Martir, Mexico

degradation_sources.name: TLE-age along-track (timing / exposure-midpoint)
degradation_sources.note: The satellite-truth is an SGP4 propagation of a TLE whose epoch precedes the exposure by 0.598 d; over that age a ~arcminutes/second LEO object accrues real along-track slip. The DOMINANT term on a real LEO frame.

degradation_sources.name: atmosphere / seeing / refraction
degradation_sources.note: Turbulence blurs the PSF and differential refraction shifts the apparent position — absent on the synthetic frame, present on every real ground-based exposure.

degradation_sources.name: real optics / PSF / aberration
degradation_sources.note: A real telescope+camera PSF (coma, field curvature, focus) is wider and less symmetric than the synthetic Gaussian, biasing the streak-midpoint centroid.

degradation_sources.name: unknown plate scale / distortion
degradation_sources.note: The true plate scale and higher-order distortion are recovered only approximately by the blind solve (no distortion polynomial fit), unlike the exact synthetic WCS.

degradation_sources.name: detector noise (read + shot)
degradation_sources.note: Real read noise and photon shot noise perturb the centroid; the synthetic frame's noise model is idealised.
